items.title: The ‘first’ AI-run ransomware attack still needed a human
items.summary: An AI agent carried out the technical execution of a real-world ransomware attack for the first known time, but new details show a human still chose the victim, set up the infrastructure, and supplied stolen credentials — meaning it wasn't quite the fully autonomous cybercrime debut that last week's
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: US investors will soon get access to SK Hynix, another memory maker riding the AI boom
items.summary: SK Hynix is experiencing a boom credited to AI. It will ride that to a multibillion-dollar U.S. IPO, expected to take place on Friday.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch on the fight to split off models from agents
items.summary: "The reality is, when you're optimizing for production, you start looking at a price/performance," Guillermo Rauch tells TechCrunch.
items.reason: AI Coding 领域重要动态，AI Agent 工程化趋势明显。
